items.title: Has New Browns Head Coach Todd Monken Met Myles Garrett? 'No'
items.summary: New Cleveland Browns head coach Todd Monken revealed that he still hasn't met "face-to-face" with superstar DE Myles Garrett.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Foden and Palmer to miss out on World Cup squad
items.summary: Nottingham Forest's Morgan Gibbs-White is also set to miss out on the squad, though Ivan Toney and Jordan Henderson are expected to be picked.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Gaikwad 'really proud' of CSK's performance in 'transition phase'
items.summary: As for the Dhoni question, Gaikwad said we will only get to know "next year"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
